title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows King Harald, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Giants, Usopp as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: It's huge... Like a sea king!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wait, if it's with you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...Don't tell me that's looki?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a buddy of yours?! No way!! That's so cool!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Right?! this guy's just too big!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you out of your minds?!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gone and made friends with another freak!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad you beat the monsters, but seriously-!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That thing's breath is only feeding the flames! Don't you see?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you have to burn Elbaf to the ground to stop the bad guys...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...it defeats the whole point! So Knock it off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You got me in trouble, LOL!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just wanna crush all the threats to Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why the hell should I give a crap about your crewmate's bitching?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Sham!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh, it's just lightning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Why didn't that work?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would've sent you flying if it did!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Fwooom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Center of Branch 8 - Brook's Group

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: USOP!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Please Flee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I came here for my own reasons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: She's dangerous!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who would run and abandon a crewmate... at a time like this?!

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: brook!!! True Warriors do not run!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: usop...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've always dreamed of visiting this place. To come to the land I've admired...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I WON'T DISGRACE MYSELF, NOT HERE!!! BESIDES, I'M BURNING WITH FURY RIGHT NOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Brook... These guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: They're looking down on Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their gutless plan was to sneak here and Kidnap children!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
